caption: A man wearing glasses, headphones, and a tall, grey, stylized wig sits in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with tan suspenders and a red-and-white patterned bow tie. He is positioned in front of a black microphone. The background is a wall covered in various framed photographs and clothing items, including a garment with "LEE" visible on it. To the left and right of the man, on-screen logos feature the text "GOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST," with the latter appearing below a graphic of a microphone. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, facing slightly to the left, and is speaking, as indicated by the subtle movements of his mouth and facial expressions across the progression of time.
